preReview.title: Nashville SC v New York Red Bulls: Schwartz hails Forsberg and Choupo-Moting
preReview.description: The New York Red Bulls hammered LA Galaxy 7-0 last weekend, with experienced duo Emil Forsberg and Eric Choupo-Moting scoring twice each.
